use_cases: Displaying stock market data in a radial/spider chart format for financial dashboards
Visualizing cyclical or periodic data patterns using polar coordinates
Monitoring time-series metrics with animated transitions in analytics platforms
Creating data-rich hero sections for fintech landing pages
ai_summary: A radial line chart component using @visx for rendering time-series stock data in polar coordinates. Features spring-based animations via @react-spring, gradient fills, and grid overlays. Designed for financial dashboards and analytics platforms needing elegant data visualization with smooth animated transitions between data states.
